title: allophylus zeylanicus var. varians
intro: Allophylus zeylanicus var. varians, also known as the Sri Lankan or Indian allophyllus, is a plant species belonging to the Sapindaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Allophylus zeylanicus var. varians include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and boils. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves, which can be used to create infusions, decoctions, or ointments for medicinal purposes.
